events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! From stadium anthems to iconic guitar solos, his influence is simply astronomical.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock's Enduring Icon
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still strutting! Wishing a very happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. Long live rock and roll.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, revolutionising music consumption with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV's Revolution
angles.copy: Forty-five years since MTV hit the airwaves, changing music forever. Remember the first video? 'Video Killed The Radio Star' indeed, but it gave birth to a whole new era.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Milestone
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. That album didn't just launch a band, it defined a generation. What's your stand-out track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15–18, 1969, becoming a defining moment of the counterculture era.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since we lost the King. Elvis Presley, who would have been 91, left an indelible mark on music. His legacy still burns bright.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur, born June 16, 1971, was shot on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas and died six days later on September 13, 1996. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years since the world lost Tupac Shakur. A voice that defined a generation, gone too soon. He would have been 55.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, born November 27, 1942, tragically passed away on September 18, 1970. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the legendary Jimi Hendrix left us. His revolutionary guitar playing would have been 84 today and continues to inspire.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous walks in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice and attitude continue to captivate.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing the rock 'n' roll attitude.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK in 1975, following its 1971 album and US single release.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: Forty-one years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK. A timeless message of peace that resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod's Impact
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod dropped and changed how we listened to music forever. Who remembers their first click wheel?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, commemorating the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Celebration
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 007 first hit the big screen. What's your favourite Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, born October 9, 1940, would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the one and only John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true titan of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles dropped 'The White Album'. A sprawling masterpiece that proved their incredible versatility.
